content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty down 0.54% with IT sector in carnage (-4.12%) after HCLTECH's weak Q4 and muted FY27 guidance. INFY and TECHM report tomorrow/today creating event risk. VIX elevated at 18.12 (+3.37%), global cues weak (S&P -0.63%). However, PSU Banks, Energy, and FMCG (defensive rotation) are showing strength. This is a stock-picker's market with clear winners/losers — not a broad risk-on environment.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24550
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 1200,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 81.50,
      "stop_loss": 77.50,
      "target": 89.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if target not hit within 10 trading days or if price breaks below 77.50 stop-loss on closing basis. Trail SL to breakeven (81.50) once price crosses 85.",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4: PAT +35% YoY, NII +19%, NNPA at 0.13% (best-in-class PSU). Breaking out to fresh 52-week high with 2.4x volume, riding PSU Bank sector momentum (+0.78% today, +11.9% MoM). Fundamental catalyst + technical breakout + sector tailwind is a high-probability setup. R/R = 1:1.88 (4.9% risk, 9.2% reward). Position sized ~9.8% of capital — moderate conviction allocation. Stock price above ₹10 minimum, volume well above ₹1cr threshold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 80,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 984.00,
      "stop_loss": 945.00,
      "target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit within 10 trading days. Trail SL to breakeven once price crosses ₹1020.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat: PAT +19% YoY, GNPA below 1% milestone, 16% retail AUM growth. RBI repo rate cut cycle (125bps cumulative) boosts HFC margins. Breakout above ₹950 consolidation with strong volume. MOFSL reiterates Buy. R/R ~1:2.5 (4% risk, 9.8% reward). Sector momentum strong. Position ~7.9% of capital — appropriate for 0.65 confidence."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 400,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 125.10,
      "stop_loss": 121.00,
      "target": 132.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Hold as portfolio hedge. Exit if gold structural thesis breaks (121 support) or target achieved.",
      "reasoning": "Defensive portfolio hedge given elevated VIX (18.12), IT sector carnage, FII selling backdrop, and geopolitical risk-off flows. Gold in structural rally with central bank buying, Goldman targeting $5400/oz. Akshaya Tritiya seasonal demand. Small allocation (~5% of capital) as risk-off ballast. R/R ~1:1.68."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tempting falling-knife setup at 52-week low after -9.47% capitulation, but catching IT sector bottom is dangerous. INFY and TECHM report today/tomorrow — additional event risk could deepen sector damage. FY27 guidance of 1-4% CC signals structural weakness. Prefer to wait for sector stabilization and see INFY/TECHM prints before attempting a contrarian entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results tomorrow (April 23) — binary event risk. HCLTECH miss is negative read-across. Bearish engulfing on April 20. No edge trading into earnings; better to wait and react post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY post-market. Trading into earnings is gambling, not investing. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Excellent Q4 fundamentals but stock up 10%+ in a single session to fresh 52-week high. Gap-and-chase risk is high — premium valuations flagged by brokerages. Would prefer to buy on a pullback to ₹1350-1370 range rather than chase."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 28-30 — event risk within holding period. Up 6.34% in one session on defensive rotation; better entry likely on pullback or post-results. No urgency."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings Q4 PAT collapsed 96% YoY on goodwill impairment. FY26 PAT down 18%. 9.88% one-day move lacks fundamental support — looks like momentum chase. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high with shooting star pattern on April 20 — potential exhaustion. Q4 results April 29 within holding window. Trading window closed. Q3 PAT was -19% YoY. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high with 3.7x volume. 4 USFDA Form 483 observations at Chantilly and historical Gagillapur OAI are compliance overhangs. Q4 results in May. Not enough edge."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TRITURBINE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "15.3x volume on a DOWN day signals distribution, not accumulation. Orders -26% YoY, Q3 PAT fell YoY, rich valuation P/E 55. Q4 results imminent. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong catalyst (arms manufacturing license, ₹404cr MoD order) and bullish broker targets. But stock up 7.37% in one day. Will watch for pullback to ₹1650-1680 support for better entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q3 PAT collapsed 57% YoY. APM gas allocation cut hurts LPG economics. 5.73% one-day bounce on ceasefire news looks tactical, not structural. Q4 results May 7. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "0.5x volume on +11.18% move is suspicious — thin-float squeeze, not genuine institutional buying. Petrochemical duty waiver is structural headwind for chemicals sector. Morgan Stanley cautious. Avoid."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [],
  "watchlist_notes": "Keep NESTLEIND, HINDUNILVR, ZENTEC on watchlist for pullback entries. NESTLEIND trigger: pullback to ₹1350-1370 zone. ZENTEC trigger: pullback to ₹1650-1680 support. HCLTECH/INFY: reassess after INFY Q4 results tomorrow — if IT sector capitulates further with volume climax, a contrarian bounce setup could emerge.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 3 of experiment. Deploying ~22.7% of capital across 3 uncorrelated positions: MAHABANK (PSU banking momentum), PNBHOUSING (NBFC/HFC beneficiary of rate cuts), GOLDBEES (defensive hedge). Total cash buffer preserved at ~77%, well above 20% minimum. Sector exposure: Financials ~17.7%, Gold ETF 5% — no single sector exceeds 35%. Avoiding all IT exposure until INFY/TECHM earnings clarity. Elevated VIX and FII caution warrant measured deployment — building slowly, not chasing 10% gap-ups."
}
